<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This project is an Automated Refund Dashboard System for SabPaisa. It uses Python (FastAPI backend), pandas for Excel parsing, and a simple HTML/JS frontend. Key features: Excel upload, transaction search, auto-validation, refund trigger, audit log, and dashboard visualizations.

- Prefer FastAPI for backend APIs.
- Use pandas for Excel file handling and validation logic.
- Frontend should be simple, modern, and user-friendly.
- Prioritize modular, readable code and clear API endpoints.
- Include comments for all validation and business logic.
